meta.title: Coffee Hawai
meta.tagline: From volcanic soil to your cup

data.name: Kona Hawai Classic
data.description: Carefully blended from Arabica beans grown in the volcanic soil of Hawaii's Kona region. Medium roast with notes of chocolate, coconut, and light citrus. The signature coffee of Coffee Hawai.

data.name: Aloha Cappuccino
data.description: A classic cappuccino prepared with the Aloha spirit. Thick milk foam topped with Kona bean dust — love from Hawaii in every sip.

data.name: Volcano Espresso
data.description: Dark roast espresso inspired by the Mauna Loa volcanic region. Thick crema with bitter chocolate and caramel finish for an energizing start.

data.name: Black Sand Americano
data.description: Pure americano inspired by Punaluu's famous black sand beach. Double espresso with hot water — simple, strong, and full of character.

data.name: Maui Sunrise Latte
data.description: A soft blend of espresso and steamed milk. Lightly dusted with cinnamon and coconut — a warm experience reminiscent of a Hawaiian sunrise.

data.name: Mauna Kea Mocha
data.tagline: The peak of chocolate and coffee
data.description: Rich mocha inspired by the majestic Mauna Kea summit. Belgian chocolate and espresso blend, served with cream and cocoa powder.

data.name: Hilo Cold Brew
data.description: Cold-steeped for 24 hours, inspired by Hilo's cool climate. Low acidity, smooth body, and a naturally sweet finish. A summer essential.

data.name: Coconut Hawai Iced
data.description: Fresh coconut milk meets cold brew espresso. Topped with coconut flakes and a pinch of cinnamon — an icy taste of Hawaii's beaches.

data.name: Hawaiian Hazelnut
data.description: Coffee Hawai's special recipe. Roasted hazelnut syrup, espresso, and milk in perfect harmony. Available hot or iced.

data.name: Tiki Cinnamon Latte
data.description: A spiced latte inspired by Tiki culture. Cinnamon, clove, and a touch of ginger for a warm, aromatic Hawaiian experience.

data.name: Pacific Flat White
data.description: Flat white carrying the calm of the Pacific Ocean. Double ristretto with silky microfoam milk for a balanced espresso experience.

data.name: Green Bean Decaf
data.description: Hawaii beans decaffeinated using the Swiss Water process. Enjoy anytime with full body and chocolate notes preserved.
